product_overview: BetterTris is a lightweight frontend for realtime multiplayer Tetris (BattleTris) where players create or join rooms to compete; the last player surviving wins. It supports core Tetris controls and a special-attack mechanic that rewards line clears.
core_goals: Allow users to create or join multiplayer matches quickly from a single lobby route (/).
Provide responsive, keyboard-driven Tetris gameplay (movement, rotation, hard drop) in real time.
Implement a special-attack system tied to line clears that can be sent to opponents via sockets.
Keep onboarding friction low (no auth required) and surface clear error states for room/join/send failures.

features.name: Multiplayer Game Lobby
features.description: Lobby UI on / where users create or join a room ID and see current players before a match starts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Create Room button -> See generated Room ID displayed in the UI -> Share Room ID with other players -> Enter Room ID in the input field (other players) -> Click Join Room button -> Socket emits 'join-room' -> See lobby with player list
Navigate to / -> Enter Room ID in the input field -> Click Join Room button -> Socket emits 'join-room' -> See lobby with player list -> Host clicks Start Game button -> Game screen appears
Navigate to / -> Enter invalid Room ID in the input field -> Click Join Room button -> Socket emits 'join-room' -> See 'Room not found' error message
Navigate to / -> Enter Room ID in the input field for a full room -> Click Join Room button -> Socket emits 'join-room' -> See 'Room full' error message
Navigate to / -> Click Create Room button -> Network error prevents room creation -> See 'Failed to create room' error message

features.name: Tetris Gameplay
features.description: Core single-player mechanics during a match: piece movement, rotation, hard drop, line clearing and game over state.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> See first piece spawn in play area -> Use arrow keys to move and rotate pieces -> Press Space for hard drop -> Clear one or more lines -> See lines removed and score updated -> Continue playing until other players lose or game over

Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> See first piece spawn in play area -> Use arrow keys to move and rotate pieces -> Press Space for hard drop -> Clear 2 lines and receive special piece notification -> See special piece available in UI

Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> Click outside the game area (lose keyboard focus) -> Use arrow keys to move pieces -> See no piece movement -> Click game canvas to refocus -> Use arrow keys to move pieces again
Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> Play until stack reaches the top -> See Game Over screen and final placement/score

features.name: Special Attack System
features.description: When players clear two lines they earn a special piece which can be targeted and sent to an opponent via socket events.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> Use arrow keys and hard drop to play -> Clear 2 lines to get a special piece -> See special piece notification in UI -> Click SEND button to target an opponent -> Socket emits 'send-special' -> Target opponent receives special piece and their board updates

Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> Clear 2 lines to get a special piece -> See special piece notification in UI -> Click SEND button without selecting an opponent -> See 'Select opponent' error message

Navigate to / -> Join a room and start a match -> Clear 2 lines to get a special piece -> Click SEND button to target an opponent -> Socket emits 'send-special' -> Socket returns error (network/server) -> See 'Failed to send special' error message

routes.description: Main BattleTris game lobby and play area
